base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of espers_summons_batch — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1994 final fantasy vi. 27 Espers — Ramuh, Shiva, Ifrit, Siren, Odin, Raiden, Phantom, Carbunkl, Bismark, Phoenix, Alexander, Crusader, Bahamut, etc.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 27 Espers — Ramuh, Shiva, Ifrit, Siren, Odin, Raiden, Phantom, Carbunkl, Bismark, Phoenix, Alexander, Crusader, Bahamut, etc.
